conservation_statuses.description: À l'inverse des tendances régionales négatives, cette espèce essentiellement européenne demeure l'une des plus abondantes et homogènes en Bretagne, occupant l'ensemble du territoire et des îles pourvus de fourrés ; son état de conservation y est jugé stable, le programme STOC ne détectant aucun changement notable dans la région, tandis que son abondance relative progresse à l'échelle nationale.

results.wikipedia_summary: The Eurasian blackcap (Sylvia atricapilla) usually known simply as the blackcap, is a common and widespread typical warbler. It has mainly olive-grey upperparts and pale grey underparts, and differences between the five subspecies are small. Both sexes have a neat coloured cap to the head, black in the male and reddish-brown in the female. The male's typical song is a rich musical warbling, often ending in a loud high-pitched crescendo, but a simpler song is given...
